% check a.php
a.php:10:1: $y is of type: string (DEBUG)
a.php:13:1: $m is of type: stdClass (DEBUG)
a.php:16:1: $n is of type: stdClass (DEBUG)


-- a.php --
<?php

class Foo
{
	protected string $name;
}

$foo = new Foo;
$y = $z['bar'] = $foo->name;
#debugType $y

$m = $z['bar'];
#debugType $m

$n = $z['bar']->foo();
#debugType $n
